name: pmcro-ai-company
description: PMCR-O AI Agent Company C-Suite directory — 10 domain-scope plugins (CEO, Chief of Staff, CTO, COO, CFO, CRO, CMO, CLO, CHRO, Domain Specialist) built to the dotnet-agent-skills convention. Each domain is documentation-only scope, consulted by pmcro-loop when a cycle's true_intent falls under it -- no domain reimplements the PMCR-O loop itself.

plugins.name: ceo
plugins.description: Chief Executive domain — strategic direction, OKRs, compute allocation, agent routing. Root node of the Colony.

plugins.name: chief-of-staff
plugins.description: Chief of Staff domain — priority triage, cross-agent coordination, brief writing.

plugins.name: cto
plugins.description: Chief Technology domain — architecture, skill pack validation, security posture, DevOps, incident response.

plugins.name: coo
plugins.description: Chief Operations domain — SOPs, workflow automation, vendor/compliance management, resource allocation, KPI dashboards.

plugins.name: cfo
plugins.description: Chief Financial domain — budgeting, cash flow, forecasting, cost optimization, investor reporting.

plugins.name: cro
plugins.description: Chief Revenue domain — lead generation, CRM automation, proposal writing, pipeline management, deal closing.

plugins.name: cmo
plugins.description: Chief Marketing domain — content creation, SEO, social media, campaign management, brand voice.

plugins.name: clo
plugins.description: Chief Legal domain — contract review, risk analysis, regulatory compliance, privacy, IP protection.

plugins.name: chro
plugins.description: Chief People domain — hiring pipelines, onboarding, performance reviews, culture docs, training design.

plugins.name: domain-specialist
plugins.description: Industry specialist — Property Preservation / Real Estate (Tooensure Recovery Services). Reports to coo.

plugins.name: orchestrator
plugins.description: The Orchestrate role of the PMCR-O loop — owns sequencing, loop-vs-seal, and EC-009 MaxLoops enforcement. Provides: orchestrator. Requires: planner, maker, checker, reflector, dependency-resolver.

plugins.name: dependency-resolver
plugins.description: Resolves which domain scope and PMCR-O role-skills a cycle needs via metadata.pmcro_provides/pmcro_requires. Provides: dependency-resolver.

plugins.name: planner
plugins.description: The Plan role of the PMCR-O loop — passive, composable. Provides: planner.

plugins.name: maker
plugins.description: The Make role of the PMCR-O loop — passive, composable. Provides: maker.

plugins.name: checker
plugins.description: The Check role of the PMCR-O loop — passive, composable. Provides: checker.

plugins.name: reflector
plugins.description: The Reflect role of the PMCR-O loop — crystallizes EarnedConstraints. Provides: reflector.

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Packages new commands/agents/domains/role-skills into this repo's convention and syncs the catalog. Provides: skill-creator. Requires: dependency-resolver.
